title: silene nivea
intro: Silene nivea, also known as white campion, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Silene nivea include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and aiding in the relief of menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Silene nivea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
